title: Domain Invasion Event Schema
description: Schema for validating domain invasion event records.

invasion_event_id.description: Unique identifier for this invasion event.

session_id.description: The ID of the multiplayer session where this invasion occurred.

attacker_player_ids.description: List of player IDs attacking the domain (1-4 players).

defender_player_id.description: The player ID of the defender/owner of the target domain.

target_domain_state_id.description: The ID of the domain state being invaded.

target_domain_archetype.description: The archetype of the target domain.

invasion_cost_paid.description: Cost paid by attackers to initiate the invasion.

attacker_advantage_used.description: List of advantages attackers used (e.g., temporary buffs).

attacker_risk_incurred.description: List of risks attackers incurred (e.g., higher visibility).

defender_advantage_active.description: List of advantages defenders had active (e.g., increased enemy density).

defender_risk_incurred.description: List of risks defenders incurred (e.g., higher domain upkeep).

outcome.description: The outcome of the domain invasion.

residue_written_to_attacker.description: True if residue was written to the attacker's history.

residue_written_to_defender.description: True if residue was written to the defender's domain/history.

playability_preserved.description: Must be true. Invasion must not leave domain unplayable.

forbidden_flags.description: Flags to ensure fair play and prevent exploits.

impossible_domain.description: Must be false. Invasion should not create an impossible domain.

free_advantage_detected.description: Must be false. No free advantages should be detected.

reward_spoof_risk.description: Must be false. No reward spoofing risk should be detected.
